import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/pages/platform-admin/WebsiteCMS.tsx");import { jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/platform-admin/WebsiteCMS.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";

const mockMedia = [

const categories = [
  "Product Updates",
  "Best Practices",
  "Compliance",
  "Industry News",
  "Case Studies",
  "How-To Guides"
];
export default function WebsiteCMS() {
  _s();
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("Pages");
  const [posts, setPosts] = useState(mockPosts);
  const [pages, setPages] = useState(mockPages);
  const [media, setMedia] = useState(mockMedia);
  const [showNewPostModal, setShowNewPostModal] = useState(false);
  const [showNewPageModal, setShowNewPageModal] = useState(false);
  const [showEditPostModal, setShowEditPostModal] = useState(false);
  const [showEditPageModal, setShowEditPageModal] = useState(false);
  const [showMediaLibraryModal, setShowMediaLibraryModal] = useState(false);
  const [showUploadModal, setShowUploadModal] = useState(false);
  const [selectedPost, setSelectedPost] = useState(null);
  const [selectedPage, setSelectedPage] = useState(null);
  const [selectingImageFor, setSelectingImageFor] = useState(null);
  const [newPost, setNewPost] = useState({
    title: "",
    coverImage: "",
    excerpt: "",
    content: "",
    category: "Product Updates",
    author: "Platform Admin"
  });
  const [newPage, setNewPage] = useState({
    title: "",
    slug: "",
    content: "",
    metaTitle: "",
    metaDescription: ""
  });
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("");
  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState("all");
  const [categoryFilter, setCategoryFilter] = useState("all");
  const handleCreatePost = (status) => {
    const post = {
      id: String(posts.length + 1),
      title: newPost.title,
      coverImage: newPost.coverImage || "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1451187580459-43490279c0fa?w=800",
      excerpt: newPost.excerpt,
      content: newPost.content,
      category: newPost.category,
      author: newPost.author,
      date: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString().split("T")[0],
      status
    };
    setPosts([post, ...posts]);
    setShowNewPostModal(false);
    setNewPost({
      title: "",
      coverImage: "",
      excerpt: "",
      content: "",
      category: "Product Updates",
      author: "Platform Admin"
    });
    alert(`Blog post ${status === "published" ? "published" : "saved as draft"} successfully!`);
  };
  const handleCreatePage = (status) => {
    const page = {
      id: String(pages.length + 1),
      title: newPage.title,
      slug: newPage.slug,
      content: newPage.content,
      metaTitle: newPage.metaTitle,
      metaDescription: newPage.metaDescription,
      status,
      lastUpdated: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString().split("T")[0],
      updatedBy: "Platform Admin"
    };
    setPages([page, ...pages]);
    setShowNewPageModal(false);
    setNewPage({
      title: "",
      slug: "",
      content: "",
      metaTitle: "",
      metaDescription: ""
    });
    alert(`Web page ${status === "published" ? "published" : "saved as draft"} successfully!`);
  };
  const handleSelectMedia = (mediaUrl) => {
    if (selectingImageFor === "cover") {
      setNewPost({ ...newPost, coverImage: mediaUrl });
    }
    setShowMediaLibraryModal(false);
    setSelectingImageFor(null);
  };
  const handleUploadMedia = (e) => {
    if (e.target.files && e.target.files[0]) {
      const file = e.target.files[0];
      const newMedia = {
        id: String(media.length + 1),
        url: URL.createObjectURL(file),
        name: file.name,
        type: file.type,
        size: `${(file.size / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1)} MB`,
        uploadedDate: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString().split("T")[0]
      };
      setMedia([newMedia, ...media]);
      setShowUploadModal(false);
      alert("Media uploaded successfully!");
    }
  };
  const handleDeletePost = (postId) => {
    if (confirm("Are you sure you want to delete this blog post?")) {
      setPosts(posts.filter((p) => p.id !== postId));
      alert("Blog post deleted successfully!");
    }
  };
  const handleDeletePage = (pageId) => {
    if (confirm("Are you sure you want to delete this web page?")) {
      setPages(pages.filter((p) => p.id !== pageId));
      alert("Web page deleted successfully!");
    }
  };
  const filteredPosts = posts.filter((post) => {
    const matchesSearch = post.title.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) || post.excerpt.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase());
    const matchesStatus = statusFilter === "all" || post.status === statusFilter;
    const matchesCategory = categoryFilter === "all" || post.category === categoryFilter;
    return matchesSearch && matchesStatus && matchesCategory;
  });
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "cach0", _fgB: 1779104380913, _fgD: true, className: "space-y-6", "data-fg-cach0": "418.282:418.46155:/src/app/pages/platform-admin/WebsiteCMS.tsx:302:5:9913:35299:e:div:xtetxtetxtxtxtxtxtxtxtxtxtxtxtxtxtx:1", children: [
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "cach2", _fgB: 1779104380913, className: "flex items-center justify-between", "data-fg-cach2": "418.282:418.46155:/src/app/pages/platform-admin/WebsiteCMS.tsx:304:7:9968:250:e:div:e", children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "cach3", _fgB: 1779104380913, "data-fg-cach3": "418.282:418.46155:/src/app/pages/platform-admin/WebsiteCMS.tsx:305:9:10028:177:e:div:ete", children: [

_s(WebsiteCMS, "ltE2wiGaw5GeyFkcb+pXQ5vl7Zw=");
_c = WebsiteCMS;
function Modal({
  title,
  onClose,
  children,
  size = "default"
}) {

_c2 = Modal;

  window.$RefreshReg$ = prevRefreshReg;

}
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/platform-admin/WebsiteCMS.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/platform-admin/WebsiteCMS.tsx", currentExports, nextExports);
